title: Create++
description: A collection of the best minecraft mods for fabric + a few of my favourites like farmer's delight, terralith, dungeons & taverns, etc. + general optimization/utility mods for client and server.
body:
# About

This modpack combines the best [Create Fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric) mods, [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated), [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/datapack/terralith), [Tectonic](https://modrinth.com/datapack/tectonic), [Sophisticated Backpacks](https://modrinth.com/mod/sophisticated-backpacks), [Dungeons and Taverns](https://modrinth.com/datapack/dungeons-and-taverns), [Immersive Aircraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-aircraft) and more! + a whole host of optimisation, QoL and server management mods. Also ships with shaders and resource packs I like to use. Everything works with 1.20.1, even though some resource packs are erroneously detected as outdated. Highly inspired by [Create+ by jonkl](https://modrinth.com/modpack/jonklscreatemodpack).

**Due to Veinminer, this modpack requires you to switch to Java 21, which will work inspite the game complaining. Turn off version check in Prism.**
